message:
style(mvcc): normalize wrapped insert calls in routing budget test

Record the remaining formatting-only adjustment in the cell-routing budget
regression test so the worktree is not left with an orphaned unstaged diff.

This commit does not change routing semantics. It only normalizes the wrapping
of the `record_insert()` calls that were touched during the earlier MVCC
budget-accounting audit, keeping the test file consistent with the formatter's
preferred layout.
